# Show and Tell

Share a sanitized Fdesign workflow. Please avoid private PSD files, private data, product images, paid fonts, credentials, and unredacted private workflow details.

Sanitization guide: https://github.com/Kriswd/Fdesign/blob/main/docs/SHOWCASE_GUIDE.md

## Workflow background

What ecommerce image-production task were you trying to automate?

## PSD template type

Main image, product detail page, campaign poster, social image, or another type.

## Excel fields

List the fields that drive the output, such as style number, color number, title, lens type, or product image names.

## PSD variables

List the text variables and image variables involved. Please describe the structure instead of uploading a private PSD.

## Output result

Which formats did you export? PSD, PSB, PNG, JPEG, or a mix?

## Reusable lessons

What setup detail would help the next user avoid repeated manual work?
